steps.title: Use the minimum and maximum
steps.content: The minimum recorded height is $44$ feet, so every recorded height satisfies $t\geq44$. The maximum recorded height is $61$ feet, so every recorded height satisfies $t\leq61$.

steps.title: Combine the bounds
steps.content: Both conditions must be true at the same time: $$ 44\leq t\leq61 $$ The answer is D.
